description: Spring Boot controller class for handling authentication endpoints, including registration, login with MFA, token refresh, and logout.

classes.name: AuthController
classes.description: REST controller for authentication-related endpoints with JWT and MFA support.

methods.name: register
methods.description: Handles user registration, creates a new applicant user, and returns user info including MFA status.

methods.name: loginStep1
methods.description: Handles login credential validation, initiates MFA if enabled, and returns login status.

methods.name: verifyMfa
methods.description: Verifies MFA OTP and returns JWT tokens upon successful MFA verification.

methods.name: refresh
methods.description: Refreshes JWT tokens, issuing new access and refresh tokens.

methods.name: logout
methods.description: Revokes the refresh token to log the user out.
